channel.title: croqaz/awesome-decentralized Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: croqaz/awesome-decentralized Oct 3rd - Oct 9th, 2022
item.description:
Applications

  • FilePizza ☠️stars3.9k: Free peer-to-peer file transfers in your browser.

item.title: croqaz/awesome-decentralized Apr 25th - May 1st, 2022
item.description:
Applications

  • SocialHomestars325: Federated personal profile with social networking functionality. Users can create rich content using Markdown and even HTML/JS/CSS. All content can be pinned to the user profile and all content will federate to contacts in the federated social web.
  • Steemit: Blockchain-based social media platform where anyone can earn rewards.
  • Ticktack ☠stars55: Decentralized social platform for people to share knowledge and exchange value, with P2P messaging encrypted feature. Built on top of Secure Scuttlebutt (SSB).

item.title: croqaz/awesome-decentralized Jan 17th - Jan 23rd, 2022
item.description:
Applications

  • Galacteek: Browser and dapps platform for the distributed web.

item.title: croqaz/awesome-decentralized Jan 10th - Jan 16th, 2022
item.description:
Applications

  • ipfs-pinnerstars35: A toolkit helps upload files to IPFS pinning services such as Infura, Pinata, NFT.Storage and Web3.Storage.

item.title: croqaz/awesome-decentralized Oct 18th - Oct 24th, 2021
item.description:
Applications

  • Deltachat: Delta Chat is like Telegram or Whatsapp but without the tracking or central control. It doesn't have their own servers but uses the most massive and diverse open messaging system ever: the existing e-mail server network. Chat with anyone if you know their e-mail address, no need for them to install DeltaChat, all you need is a standard e-mail account.

    • Other

  • Solid: Solid was created by the inventor of the World Wide Web, Sir Tim Berners-Lee. Solid is a specification that lets people store their data securely in decentralized data stores called Pods. Pods are like secure personal web servers for your data. For developer resources, see Developer Resources. For a listing of some Solid applications, see Solid Applications.

item.title: croqaz/awesome-decentralized Oct 11th - Oct 17th, 2021
item.description:
Applications

  • Retroshare: Encrypted connections between you and your friends to create a network of computers, and provides various distributed services on top of it: forums, channels, chat, mail...

item.title: croqaz/awesome-decentralized Oct 4th - Oct 10th, 2021
item.description:
Applications

  • TheDistributedBay ☠️stars26: P2P rewrite of the Open Bay/Pirate Bay. It uses a completely distributed protocol to share entries between numerous nodes. This makes it nearly impossible to take down by seizure of servers. Each node contains a complete copy, and any changes are propagated through the network.
  • webcat ☠️stars424: P2P pipe across the web using webrtc that uses Github private/public key for authentication and a signalhub for discovery. Can send text or files.
  • Airsharestars586: CLI tool and module for transferring data between 2 machines in a local network, P2P, using Multicast-DNS. Works completely offline. communities with auditable moderation and mod elections.
  • Agregorestars525: A minimalistic web browser that supports multiple peer-to-peer protocols and is extensible with standard WebExtensions.
  • airpaste ☠️stars794: A 1-1 network pipe that auto discovers other peers using mdns. Can send text or files.
  • Friendicastars1.1k: Decentralised communications platform that integrates social communication. Connect effortlessly to a federated communications network of several thousand servers, with more than half a million users. Directly connect to anyone on Friendica, Mastodon, Diaspora, GnuSocial, Pleroma, or Hubzilla, regardless of where each user profile is hosted.
  • LFstars875: Fully decentralized fully replicated key/value store. Fully decentralized means anyone can run a node without obtaining special permission, and all nodes are effectively equal. Fully replicated means every node stores all data.
  • ShareDrop ☠️stars5.8k: Clone of Apple AirDrop service. Allows transferring files directly between devices, without having to upload them to any server first.

item.title: croqaz/awesome-decentralized Sep 27th - Oct 3rd, 2021
item.description:
Applications

  • SimpleX chatstars1.7k: A decentralized terminal-based chat (a mobile app coming soon) with a focus on users’ privacy. It doesn't use any global user identities (not even random IDs), supports groups and sending files.

item.title: croqaz/awesome-decentralized Aug 23rd - Aug 29th, 2021
item.description:
Applications

  • Hubzilla: General purpose platform for creating interconnected websites featuring a decentralized identity, communications, and permissions framework built using common webserver technology.

item.title: croqaz/awesome-decentralized Aug 16th - Aug 22nd, 2021
item.description:
Applications

  • ipfs-chatstars87: Terminal-based, secure chatrooms using IPFS. Works over both LAN and internet (includes NAT traversal). Supports private-messaging and file/directory sharing.

item.title: croqaz/awesome-decentralized Aug 9th - Aug 15th, 2021
item.description:
Applications

  • Vdo.Ninjastars1.8k: 100% free; no downloads; no personal data collection; no sign-in, cutting edge Peer-to-Peer forwarding technology that offers privacy and ultra-low latency

item.title: croqaz/awesome-decentralized Jul 19th - Jul 25th, 2021
item.description:
Applications

  • Noms ☠️stars7.5k: Versioned, forkable, syncable decentralized database, philosophically descendant from the Git version control system. Nobody is working on this right now.

item.title: croqaz/awesome-decentralized Jun 21st - Jun 27th, 2021
item.description:
Applications

  • Cryptorstars29: Overlay P2P network that values your privacy and anonymity above all else. Packages and some clients included.

item.title: croqaz/awesome-decentralized May 31st - Jun 6th, 2021
item.description:
Applications

  • Pollenstars5: A decentralized messaging service that functions without any internet or mesh connection. Written in Python.

item.title: croqaz/awesome-decentralized May 24th - May 30th, 2021
item.description:
Applications

  • Dropub ☠️: Share files for free on the internet. It's like Dropbox meets BitTorrent.
  • Friends ☠️stars3.2k: P2P chat powered by the web. This project is alpha quality.
  • Hyperpadstars196: Peer-to-peer collaborative text editor.
  • instant.iostars3.1k: Streaming file transfer over WebTorrent (torrents on the web).
  • IPFS bin ☠️stars130: Pastebin application for sharing code and text documents to other people.
  • IPFS Desktopstars4.6k: A native application to run your own IPFS Node.
  • iWant ☠️stars286: Commandline tool for searching and downloading files in LAN network, without any central server.
  • ORC ☠️: Onion Routed Cloud, a decentralized, anonymous, file storage platform. It uses the Tor network.
  • Peertransfer ☠️stars273: Send a file p2p and e2e encrypted using nothing but your browser.
  • YaCy: Free distributed search engine, built on principles of P2P networks.
  • Aetherstars1.1k: P2P ephemeral public communities. Open source, self-governing

item.title: croqaz/awesome-decentralized Mar 15th - Mar 21st, 2021
item.description:
Applications

  • Cactus Comments: Federated comment system for the open web built on Matrix.

item.title: croqaz/awesome-decentralized Mar 8th - Mar 14th, 2021
item.description:
Other

  • DataTokenstars17: A decentralized access control system for off-chain data sharing and monetization. Its vision is to make the data flows more transparent, by returning data ownership to its owners while maintaining the computability of data.

item.title: croqaz/awesome-decentralized Mar 1st - Mar 7th, 2021
item.description:
Applications

  • Ferment ☠️: P2P audio publishing and streaming application. Like SoundCloud but decentralized. Built using SSB + Webtorrent.
  • Hardbinstars211: Encrypted pastebin using IPFS.

    • Other

  • ArcBlock: ArcBlock is a decentralized developer platform that simplifies the development of DApps, DLT and Blockchains.

item.title: croqaz/awesome-decentralized Nov 9th - Nov 15th, 2020
item.description:
Applications

  • Mobilizon: A federated tool that helps you find, create and organise events.

item.title: croqaz/awesome-decentralized Jul 20th - Jul 26th, 2020
item.description:
Applications

  • Element (formerly Riot): Collaboration client for the web. Chat, VOIP video, file transfer, end-to-end crypto.
  • reep.io ☠️: Transfer files directly to another browser, your peer will be able to download the file directly from you.

item.title: croqaz/awesome-decentralized Mar 23rd - Mar 29th, 2020
item.description:
Applications

  • Bertystars6.1k: secure peer-to-peer messaging app that works with or without internet access, cellular data or trust in the network.

item.title: croqaz/awesome-decentralized Feb 17th - Feb 23rd, 2020
item.description:
Applications

  • Cabalstars759: P2P community offline-first chat platform.

    • Related Lists

  • https://lhs.nu/archive

item.title: croqaz/awesome-decentralized Aug 19th - Aug 25th, 2019
item.description:
Applications

  • Philes: A simple IPFS-powered decentralized notepad app.

item.title: croqaz/awesome-decentralized Jul 15th - Jul 21st, 2019
item.description:
Applications

  • Jami: Free and universal communication platform which preserves the user's privacy and freedoms. Desktop and mobile apps for text messaging, video and audio calls, file transfer, video conferencing.

item.title: croqaz/awesome-decentralized Jul 8th - Jul 14th, 2019
item.description:
Applications

  • crocstars20.9k: Easily and securely send files and folders from one computer to another in command line.
  • norcal: P2P command-line calendar in Node.js. Can sync, link, embed, and edit offline.
  • twtxtstars38: Decentralized microblogging platform "for hackers" based on text files. The user is "followed" and "mentioned" by referencing the URL to their twtxt.txt file and a nickname.

item.title: croqaz/awesome-decentralized Jun 24th - Jun 30th, 2019
item.description:
Related Lists

  • https://github.com/openblockchains/awesome-blockchainsstars3.6k

    • Applications

  • Pleroma: Federated social networking server built on open protocols. It is compatible with GNU Social, Mastodon, and many other ActivityPub and OStatus implementations.

item.title: croqaz/awesome-decentralized Dec 3rd - Dec 9th, 2018
item.description:
Applications

  • Mastodon: Social networking, back in your hands. Follow friends, discover new ones. Publish anything you want: links, pictures, text, video. A platform that is community-owned and ad-free.

item.title: croqaz/awesome-decentralized Aug 6th - Aug 12th, 2018
item.description:
Applications

  • Handshake: Decentralized, permissionless naming protocol compatible with DNS where every peer is validating and in charge of managing the root zone with the goal of creating an alternative to existing Certificate Authorities.
  • Orionstars120: Easy to Use, Inter Planetary File System (IPFS) desktop client.

item.title: croqaz/awesome-decentralized May 7th - May 13th, 2018
item.description:
Applications

  • nuTorrent ☠️stars231: A Pure Javascript BitTorrent Client. Built with Electron and React.
  • LCVPNstars493: Light decentralized VPN in golang.
  • Meshbirdstars3.4k: Meshbird enables distributed private networking across geographically dispersed datacenters.

item.title: croqaz/awesome-decentralized Apr 30th - May 6th, 2018
item.description:
Applications

  • NewNodestars373: Decentralized Content Distribution Network (dCDN).

item.title: croqaz/awesome-decentralized Apr 16th - Apr 22nd, 2018
item.description:
Applications

  • PeerTubestars11k: Video streaming platform using BitTorrent directly in the web browser, with WebTorrent and Angular. Demo server at peertube.cpy.re.
  • AKASHA: A Next-Generation Social Media Network. Powered by the Ethereum world computer. Embedded into the Inter-Planetary File System.
  • Patchworkstars3.6k: Decentralized messaging and sharing app built on top of Secure Scuttlebutt (SSB). Another alternative interface is Patchbaystars372.
  • Syncthing-GTKstars1.1k: GUI for Syncthing - a continuous file synchronization program.

item.title: croqaz/awesome-decentralized Apr 2nd - Apr 8th, 2018
item.description:
Applications

  • OnionShare: Open source tool that lets you securely and anonymously share a file of any size.

item.title: croqaz/awesome-decentralized Nov 6th - Nov 12th, 2017
item.description:
Applications

  • Open Bazaar: Decentralized network for P2P commerce online - using Bitcoin - that has no fees and no restrictions.
  • WebTorrent Desktop: WebTorrent Desktop is for streaming torrents. It connects to both BitTorrent and WebTorrent peers.

item.title: croqaz/awesome-decentralized Sep 11th - Sep 17th, 2017
item.description:
Other

  • Blockply: Blockply is a collection of the most interesting & outstanding Blockchain projects.

    • Applications

  • Demonsaw: Secure and anonymous information sharing application that makes security simple and gives you back control of your data.
  • Ricochet: Different approach to instant messaging that doesn’t trust anyone in protecting your privacy. It uses the Tor network.
  • Tox: Instant messaging application, without central servers. The system is distributed, peer-to-peer, and end-to-end encrypted.

item.title: croqaz/awesome-decentralized Feb 20th - Feb 26th, 2017
item.description:
Applications

  • Beaker: Experimental browser. It adds new technologies for Peer-to-Peer applications while staying compatible with the rest of the Web.
  • CacheP2Pstars866: highly distributed cache platform based on WebTorrent and runs only in the browser.
  • Roll-Call: Free and reliable audio calls for everyone w/ browser P2P.
  • Storj: Blockchain-based, end-to-end encrypted, distributed object storage, where only you have access to your data.

item.title: croqaz/awesome-decentralized Jan 30th - Feb 5th, 2017
item.description:
Applications

  • Diasporastars13.1k: A privacy-aware, distributed, open source social network. Main pod is at Diasp.eu.
  • Orbitstars1.6k: Distributed, serverless, peer-to-peer chat application on IPFS.

item.title: croqaz/awesome-decentralized Jan 23rd - Jan 29th, 2017
item.description:
Other

  • Blockstack: The new decentralized internet. Platform for application development with built in decentralized DNS.
  • okTurtles: DNSChain = Secure Blockchain Access and BlockchainID = decentralized web login.
  • Cryptosphere: Open-source P2P web application platform for decentralized, privacy-preserving software which keeps users in control of their own content.

    • Applications

  • Bitmessage: P2P communications protocol used to send encrypted messages to another person or to many subscribers.
  • I2P: Anonymous network, exposing a simple layer that applications can use to anonymously and securely send messages to each other.
  • MaidSafe: Decentralized internet and app infrastructure which rewards users for participating in the network.
  • Neocities: Geocities-style websites, but decentralized.
  • ZeroNet: Open, free and uncensorable websites, using Bitcoin cryptography and BitTorrent network. Uncensored, no hosting costs, always accessible.
  • Dat desktop appstars645: Decentralized data tool for distributing data small and large.

    • Related Lists

  • https://github.com/retrohacker/awesome-p2pstars138
  • https://github.com/Kikobeats/awesome-network-jsstars517
  • https://github.com/gdamdam/awesome-decentralized-webstars1.5k
  • https://github.com/kgryte/awesome-peer-to-peerstars2.1k
  • https://github.com/steve-vincent/awesome-decentralizedstars181
  • https://redecentralize.github.io/alternative-internet
